rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code homestead exemption amounts. Elec. Code §276.003 criminalizes unlawful removal of voted ballots from a ballot box. The two provisions address entirely unrelated subjects with no operative overlap.
quote: A person commits an offense if the person knowingly or intentionally removes or attempts to remove voted ballots from a ballot box in a manner not authorized by law.
_note: No conflict; rule_text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change.
